title: Diviner
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Diviner.jpg|thumb|right|250px|One pod of ''Diviner'' group launches from the [[Cerebus (bulk cruiser)|''Cerebus'']].]]
'''''Diviner''''' was a squad of [[Viper probe droid/Legends|viper probe droids]] that were in the service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the year [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].

==History==
''Diviner'' was stationed aboard the [[Cerebus (bulk cruiser)|''Cerebus'']]. After the Imperial victory over the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in 3 ABY, Admiral [[Garreth Holtz|Holtz]] was assigned to destroy the [[Defiance Task Force]], the Rebel fleet tasked with escorting the survivors of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] to safety. Holtz planned to do this by deploying viper probe droids across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to track down this force. ''Diviner'' was one of the probe squadrons assigned to this task.

''Diviner'' was deployed by the [[Corrupter Task Force]] in 3 ABY when that fleet was attacked by a pair of [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]] launched by the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']]. One of the pilots was [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]], who destroyed all of ''Diviner''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
